$comment: IntentProof rule reason vocabulary. Each entry maps a stable reason code to its rule category and a short human description. Codes follow the convention <outcome>.<category>.<specifier> where outcome is one of pass | fail | inconclusive. See plan-intentproof/05-verification-dsl.md for the rule grammar. This file is the source of truth for the reason vocabulary; the finding schema enum is intentionally maintained separately and may be wired up by a future remediation item.

reasons.description: Required action occurred within the configured min/max bounds.
Required action did not occur at all in the matched scope.
Required action occurred but fewer times than the configured minimum.
Required action occurred more times than the configured maximum.
Forbidden action did not occur (or only occurred outside its gate).
Forbidden action occurred and no gating clause is configured.
Forbidden action occurred after its configured predecessor action.
Forbidden action occurred without the required predecessor action.
All matched after-events were preceded by their before-event.
An after-event occurred earlier than its paired before-event within scope.
Pair-scoped ordering rule saw an after-event with no matching before-event.
Generic ordering violation when a more specific reason does not apply.
After-event is present but no before-event exists anywhere in the flow.
Action count satisfies the configured exactly / min / max bounds.
Action count does not equal the configured exactly value.
Action count is below the configured minimum.
Action count exceeds the configured maximum.
Action count falls outside the configured range when min/max share a single specifier.
Interval between the configured anchors falls within the allowed window.
to-anchor occurred before from-anchor beyond the clock-skew tolerance.
Interval is shorter than the configured minimum.
Interval is longer than the configured maximum.
Generic temporal-window violation when a more specific reason does not apply.
from-anchor or to-anchor event is absent from the flow.
Negative interval is within the configured clock-skew tolerance.
Configured consensus threshold met with no live disagreement.
Insufficient agreeing sources to satisfy the configured threshold.
Two or more live sources actively disagree on the claim value.
Generic consensus shortfall when a more specific reason does not apply.
All external sources unavailable and no internal source exists.
Required signature missing or invalid while require_signed_sources is true.
Claim value falls within the configured numeric bound.
Claim value violates the configured numeric bound (lt/lte/gt/gte/eq/neq).
Configured claim was not emitted by the named source for the flow.
Claim value equals the configured expected value.
Claim value differs from the configured expected value.
Configured claim was not emitted by the named source for the flow.
Required source signature missing or invalid while require_signed is true.
